title: ICMR NITVAR – Project Research Scientist I – 2 Posts
shortInfo: ICMR-National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Project Research Scientist I (Medical). Candidates with MBBS Can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 04-06-2026. For detailed information please visit ICMR NITVAR official website icmr.gov.in.
